message:
test(fcp-conformance/host-supervisor): pin RestartPolicy + ExponentialBackoff + RestartTracker connector lifecycle contract (resolves flywheel_connectors-0v7sk)

39 tests pinning the supervisor that decides how aggressively the
host revives flapping connectors. Zero prior conformance coverage.

- RestartPolicy::default = OnFailure; full 4×3 (policy × exit-kind)
  should_restart matrix: Always→all-true, OnFailure→!is_clean,
  OnCrash→signal-only, Never→all-false
- ProcessExit constructors (clean, with_code, with_signal) +
  is_clean / is_signal_terminated predicates; Display 4-form
  contract (exit code N / signal N / code+signal / unknown)
- ProcessState predicates: is_running ⇔ Running variant; is_terminal
  ⇔ Stopped|Failed; label() snake_case for all 5 variants
- StopReason Display: 5 documented strings ("requested" / "host
  shutdown" / "health check failed" / "resource limit exceeded" /
  "upgrade") + snake_case serde wire form
- SupervisorConfig defaults: max_restarts=5, restart_window=5min,
  health_check=30s/10s, graceful_shutdown=30s, initial_backoff=500ms,
  max_backoff=1min, multiplier=2.0, policy=OnFailure
- ExponentialBackoff: first call=initial, multiplies by multiplier,
  caps at max, multiplier<1.0 normalizes to 2.0 (degenerate guard),
  initial>max clamped down, reset zeros attempt
- RestartTracker: Never policy denies all, OnFailure denies clean
  exit, grants under limit, MaxRestartsExceeded carries count+window,
  record_successful_start resets backoff but preserves history,
  total_restarts persists across window pruning
- RestartDenied Display: 'restart policy denied' /
  'max restarts exceeded: N restarts in Ws window'

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
